what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment, linking the design-source channel to the image asset at image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-14.
observations: YAML frontmatter only with no body content
target uses an image:// URI pointing to pitch-deck/p-14
standouts: Target URI uses a custom image:// scheme
Attachment ties a pitch-deck image to the design-source channel
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
notes: A lightweight ledger entry that records which image asset was attached to the design-source channel and when.
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record an attachment, and the file does exactly that.
intention_signals: To create a durable, timestamped record associating a pitch-deck image with the design-source channel for retrieval and provenance.
novelty: Use of an image:// URI scheme to identify the target asset.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped link between a channel and an image asset, supporting attachment provenance and asset lookup in a fused system.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment ledger file named att-da1ad48a that records an images-type attachment linking the design-source channel to image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-14 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To log the association of a pitch-deck image with the design-source channel for later reference and provenance.
